structured_payload_candidate.title: Supply Fan Start/Stop
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Supply fan runs in Cooldown, Setup, or Occupied modes. Also runs in Setback or Warmup if any VAV-reheat boxes on perimeter zones.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan in Cooldown, Setup, Occupied modes. Also in Setback or Warmup if perimeter VAV-reheat boxes exist.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Supply fan shall run when system is in the Cooldown Mode, Setup Mode, or Occupied Mode. If there are any VAV-reheat boxes on perimeter zones, supply fan shall also run when system is in Setback Mode or Warmup Mode

evidence_quote: 5.16.11 .) a. S-R-DIFF. The  airflow differential between supply air and return air fans required to maintain
anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
evidence_text: 5.16.11 .) a. S-R-DIFF. The  airflow differential between supply air and return air fans required to maintain
judge_reason: Evidence does not support the summary; it discusses S-R-DIFF airflow differential, not fan start/stop modes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Relief Fan Control - Staging
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up: when control loop > min speed+15% for 7 min, start next fan. Stage down: when loop < min speed for 5 min, stop lag fan. Stage 0: barometric relief when loop output >5% open dampers, close when 0% for 5 min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Control loop output relative to thresholds.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up timer 7 min, stage down timer 5 min. All fans in pressure zone run at same speed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage Up. When control loop is above minimum speed plus 15%, start stage-up timer. Each time the timer reaches 7 minutes, start the next relief fan... Stage Down. When PID loop is below minimum speed, start stage-down timer. Each time the timer reaches 5 minutes, shut off lag fan...

evidence_quote: 5.16.9.7.  Fan speed signal to all operating fans in the relief system group shall be the same and shall be equal
anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
evidence_text: 5.16.9.7.  Fan speed signal to all operating fans in the relief system group shall be the same and shall be equal
judge_reason: Evidence does not support the staging thresholds and timers described in the summary.
